## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded paths (uses `$HOME`, `$WORKSPACE_DIR`, or variables)
- [ ] No personal API keys or tokens
- [ ] Works for any developer (not just my personal setup)
- [ ] Tested by running `setup.sh` or `install.sh` on a clean directory
- [ ] Follows existing file naming conventions
- [ ] Updated README.md if adding a new top-level file
